languages.text: "Я бы закрыл на то глаза, если бы не плачевность вашего правления. Вы ведете нашу династию к упадку, от которого я уберег ее дорогой ценой. Вы позволили себе стать марионеткой Калькасара, преподнеся ему Ярмо. Вы не готовы, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Склонитесь перед истинным Вольным Торговцем и примкните к моей свите. А потом, однажды, когда вы будете готовы, то унаследуете Патент за мной по праву. И, клянусь Золотым Троном, вы будете достойны! Я сделаю для этого все".

"I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then one day, when you are prepared, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

languages.text: "Ich hätte diesbezüglich ja ein Auge zugedrückt, wäre da nicht Euer erbärmlicher Führungsstil. Unter Eurer Herrschaft verkommt die Dynastie ... und um genau das zu vermeiden, habe ich einst einen hohen Preis bezahlt. Ihr habt Euch zu Calcazars Marionette gemacht, als Ihr ihm das Joch überlassen habt. Ihr seid noch nicht bereit, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Verneigt Euch vor einem wahren Freihändler und schließt Euch meinem Gefolge an. Und wenn Ihr dann eines Tages bereit seid, werdet Ihr meinen Handelsbrief rechtmäßig erben. Und beim Goldenen Thron, Ihr werdet würdig sein! Ich werde alles dafür tun."
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

Verneigt Euch vor einem wahren Freihändler und schließt Euch meinem Gefolge an. Und wenn Ihr dann eines Tages bereit seid, werdet Ihr meinen Handelsbrief rechtmäßig erben. Und beim Goldenen Thron, Ihr werdet würdig sein! Ich werde alles dafür tun."

languages.text: « J'aurais sans doute pu l'ignorer si vous n'aviez pas été {mf|un|une} aussi piètre {mf|dirigeant|dirigeante}. Sous vos ordres, notre dynastie est menacée par le déclin, un sort que je m'étais pourtant efforcé d'éviter à tout prix. Vous avez laissé Calcazar vous manipuler en lui cédant le Joug. Vous n'êtes pas {mf|prêt|prête}, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Inclinez-vous face à un véritable libre-marchand, rejoignez mon entourage, et un jour peut-être, le moment venu, vous hériterez de ma lettre de marque. Et par le Trône d'Or, alors, vous l'aurez méritée ! Je ferai tout pour que ce soit le cas. »
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

Vous n'êtes pas {mf|prêt|prête}, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Inclinez-vous face à un véritable libre-marchand, rejoignez mon entourage, et un jour peut-être, le moment venu, vous hériterez de ma lettre de marque. Et par le Trône d'Or, alors, vous l'aurez méritée ! Je ferai tout pour que ce soit le cas. »

languages.text: «Habría ignorado eso de no ser por su patético liderazgo. Bajo su mando, nuestra dinastía se dirige al declive, algo que evité en mi época a un alto precio. Se ha permitido convertirse en el títere de Calcazar al entregarle el Yugo. No está preparad{mf|o|a}, hereder{mf|o|a}. Inclínese ante un verdadero Comerciante Independiente y únase a mi séquito. Así, un día, cuando de verdad esté preparad{mf|o|a}, heredará legítimamente mi Patente. ¡Y, por el Trono Dorado, será dign{mf|o|a} de ella! Haré lo que sea necesario para garantizarlo».
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

Así, un día, cuando de verdad esté preparad{mf|o|a}, heredará legítimamente mi Patente. ¡Y, por el Trono Dorado, será dign{mf|o|a} de ella! Haré lo que sea necesario para garantizarlo».

languages.text: "Liderliğin bu kadar içler acısı olmasaydı bunu görmezden gelirdim. Yönetimin altında hanedanlığımız çöküşe sürükleniyor. Bu, bir zamanlar önlemek için ağır bir bedel ödediğim bir şey. Boyunduruk'u ona vererek Calcazar'ın kuklası oldun. Hazır değilsin vârisim. Gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in önünde eğil ve maiyetime katıl. Sonra gün gelip de hazır olduğunda Ruhsatname'yi haklı olarak miras alacaksın. Altın Taht aşkına... Buna layık olacaksın! Bunu sağlamak için ne gerekiyorsa yapacağım."
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

languages.text: “要不是你那糟糕透顶的统治，我本来可以对这一切睁一只眼闭一只眼。在你的统治下，我们的王朝正走向衰落，而我当年曾付出惨重代价只为扭转这种局面。你把圣枷交给卡尔卡扎的时候，就已经沦为他的傀儡了。你还没准备好，我的继承人。向真正的行商浪人低头，加入我的随行队伍吧。等有一天你准备好了，便能名正言顺地继承我的贸易授状。黄金王座为证，你定能担当起重任！我会倾尽全力成全此事。”
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

traits.locale_text: “要不是你那糟糕透顶的统治，我本来可以对这一切睁一只眼闭一只眼。在你的统治下，我们的王朝正走向衰落，而我当年曾付出惨重代价只为扭转这种局面。你把圣枷交给卡尔卡扎的时候，就已经沦为他的傀儡了。你还没准备好，我的继承人。向真正的行商浪人低头，加入我的随行队伍吧。等有一天你准备好了，便能名正言顺地继承我的贸易授状。黄金王座为证，你定能担当起重任！我会倾尽全力成全此事。”

languages.text: 「君がひどいリーダーシップでなければ、私は目を瞑っていただろう。君が統治する下で、我々の王朝は衰退の道を歩んでいる。かつて私は高額の代償を払ってそれを回避したのだ。君がヨークをカルカザールに渡した時、君は彼の操り人形になった。君には準備ができていない。真のローグトレーダーに頭を下げ、私の側近に加わるのだ。そしていつか、君が準備ができたら、君が正当に私の令状を継承するだろう。そして黄金の王座によって、君がその資格を得るだろう。私はそれを実現するために、あらゆることをするだろう。」
languages.original_text: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."

traits.locale_text: 「君がひどいリーダーシップでなければ、私は目を瞑っていただろう。君が統治する下で、我々の王朝は衰退の道を歩んでいる。かつて私は高額の代償を払ってそれを回避したのだ。君がヨークをカルカザールに渡した時、君は彼の操り人形になった。君には準備ができていない。真のローグトレーダーに頭を下げ、私の側近に加わるのだ。そしていつか、君が準備ができたら、君が正当に私の令状を継承するだろう。そして黄金の王座によって、君がその資格を得るだろう。私はそれを実現するために、あらゆることをするだろう。」
